question: Special agent, counterintelligence
canonical_answer: Personnel holding MOS 35L, 351L, and 35E as a primary specialty, and civilian personnel in the GG-0132 career field, who have successfully completed the Counterintelligence Special Agent Course and whe are authorized to be issued counterintelligence badge and credentials (AR 381-20).
